summary: Carrier admin wizard step for registering service locations (sedes). Displays existing locations from useVendorLocations, opens a create modal using useCreateLocation, and reports step validity (>= 1 location) to the parent CompanySetupScreen. Follows the SetupStepResources + CreateVehicleModal pattern.

businessIntent.problem: Without registered service locations the distribution trigger cannot match freight requests to this carrier. The wizard guides the admin to register at least one geographic coverage zone.
businessIntent.expectedOutcome: Screen renders existing locations list, allows adding new sedes via a modal, and calls onValidationChange(true) when >= 1 location exists.

selectedBuildingBlocks.name: screen-hook-separation
selectedBuildingBlocks.reason: Screen only renders — all data comes from useVendorLocations and useCreateLocation hooks

selectedBuildingBlocks.name: loading-empty-error-state
selectedBuildingBlocks.reason: Empty state when no locations yet; loading state while listener initializes

existingPatternsToFollow: sharedProps pattern from parent: { data, setData, onValidationChange }
isModalVisible / setIsModalVisible local state for create modal
Call onValidationChange(locations.length > 0) whenever locations list updates
useTheme() and useTranslations() for all theme values and strings — never hardcode
useSpacing() for all margin/padding values — never hardcode numbers
FlatList or ScrollView for existing items list
knownAntiPatternsToAvoid: No direct Firestore calls in screen — use useVendorLocations and useCreateLocation hooks
No hardcoded colors, strings, or spacing values
No business logic in screen — only presentation and modal state

claudeCodeOnly: Register WizardStepLocations in CompanySetupScreen SETUP_TABS array

create.description: Wizard step screen: lists existing locations from useVendorLocations, opens a create modal via useCreateLocation, calls onValidationChange when >= 1 location exists.
Dynamic styles for WizardStepLocations using theme and appearance.

dataModelsTouched.notes: Read via useVendorLocations hook. Write via useCreateLocation hook. Screen never calls Firestore directly.

failureEscalationRules: If hook imports fail: verify useVendorLocations and useCreateLocation are in src/carrier/hooks/
If theme imports fail: reload project-structure-imports building block

steps: Generate WizardStepLocations.tsx following SetupStepResources + CreateVehicleModal reference patterns
Generate styles.ts following existing screen style patterns
Produce handoff package for Claude Code integration

claudeCodeIntegrationPlan.reason: Screen must be registered in CompanySetupScreen SETUP_TABS — Claude Code direct after factory generates the file.
steps: Register WizardStepLocations in CompanySetupScreen SETUP_TABS array
Verify in simulator: locations list renders, add modal opens, onValidationChange fires
simulatorValidation: Open Company Setup wizard — navigate to Locations tab
Add a location — verify it appears in the list

steps: Remove WizardStepLocations entry from CompanySetupScreen SETUP_TABS

acceptanceCriteria: Displays list of existing locations from useVendorLocations
Shows empty state when no locations exist yet
Add button opens create modal with name/address/lat/lng/maxDistanceService fields
On successful create: list refreshes via realtime listener, modal closes
No hardcoded colors, strings, or spacing
